subject: Fw: reference
body:
Read the thread - what do I do with

----- Original Message -----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Wed Nov 28 11:25:00 2007
Subject: Re: reference

Hallo G!!!! :)
Sorry for my unclear scribbles! Could you please give me good (of course! ) references for a job with the mergers & acquisitions group at Island Global Yachting in Dubai? They have extended me an offer. 
 
Please, it would be very nice if you could? If so, how would you prefer they contact you?
 
 

 
On Nov 28, 2007 8:19 PM, Gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com> wrote:


	Are you asking for his contact info?
	
	----- Original Message -----
	From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
	To: GM < gmax1@mindspring.com>
	Sent: Wed Nov 28 01:06:21 2007
	Subject: reference
	
	Dearest lady G!
	Could you please, please give me references to Andrew Farkas' company, Island Global Yachting? If so, Steve English or Ahmed Lasheen will contact you. Let me know if this is ok? 
	
	JE gave me the OK when I told him I was headhunted for a position at IGY.
	
	Thank you!
	Hope you're well, always :)
	--
	Cecilia Steen
	Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
	




-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
